input_contract: tumor-normal WGS or WES BAMs plus SNP pileup/normal contamination policy
primary_outputs: allele-specific copy-number segments with total/minor copy number and purity/ploidy estimates
validation_target: HG008 and COLO829 CNV/LOH truth overlap
caveat: FACETS is a strong first candidate for allele-specific CNV/LOH but must be containerized and validated before interpretation

input_contract: tumor-normal WGS or WES BAMs plus germline SNP loci
primary_outputs: allele-specific copy-number segments with purity/ploidy estimates
validation_target: HG008 and COLO829 CNV/LOH truth overlap
caveat: ASCAT is a mature allele-specific CNV candidate but requires R/container setup and matched-normal SNP handling

input_contract: tumor-normal WGS BAMs plus AMBER/COBALT/SAGE-compatible HMF preprocessing
primary_outputs: integrated purity/ploidy copy-number and structural context
validation_target: COLO829 and HG008 integrated CNV/SV truth overlap
caveat: PURPLE is attractive for integrated WGS interpretation but has a larger HMF toolchain dependency surface

input_contract: tumor-normal WGS or WES BAMs plus seqz conversion
validation_target: HG008 and COLO829 CNV/LOH truth overlap
caveat: Sequenza is useful as a backup cross-check but should not be the only production CNV path
